DEFENDANT XIAN LIU APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT WITH AN INTERPRETER FRIEND NAMED VICKY. NO APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT STEVEN OU. MS. LIU REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE WAS NOT GIVEN NOTICE AND DIDN'T RECEIVE ANY PHONE CALL FROM HER ATTORNEY FOR THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO XIAN LIU AND STEVEN OU ARE DISCHARGED AND COURT ORDERS THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendants Steven Ou and Xian Liu in pro per in person. Court provided Cantonese interpreter, Jeff Dinn. No other appearances.

Discussed. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STEVEN OU, XIAN LIU Motion To End Case is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient Notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion filed on March 20, 2023 and served by mail on March 17, 2023 for a hearing on March 28, 2023. There are only 7 court days between March 28, 2023 and March 17, 2023; and only 6 court days between March 20, 2023 and March 28, 2023. Required notice is 16 court days, plus 5 calendar day for mail.
